headline: Lego’s Donkey Kong arcade machine lets Mario jump endless barrels — Miyamoto is reportedly happy
summary: Lego has released a new $200 Donkey Kong arcade machine set. The nostalgic set was designed by Carl Merriam, known for other iconic Nintendo builds. Mario creator Miyamoto is reportedly pleased with the new release.

headline: Meta won’t have to face the next planned social media addiction trial
summary: Meta will not proceed with its next social media addiction trial. The 15-year-old Florida plaintiff, R.K.C., dropped the case less than a week before trial. This was meant to be the second bellwether trial testing legal arguments against the platform.

headline: Tesla’s revenues are bouncing back, but profits are still weak
summary: Tesla's revenues are recovering after two years of weakening demand and falling sales. Q2 2026 earnings show progress following an impressive delivery report. Despite revenue growth, the EV company's profits remain weak.

headline: Price-hiked iPads are a little cheaper right now
summary: Several Apple iPads, which saw price increases last month, are currently on sale. The 13-inch iPad Pro M5 with 512GB of storage is $150 off at Amazon. This deal brings its price down from the original $1,699.

headline: Doom Co-Creator John Romero to Headline Gamescom Asia x Thailand Game Show 2026
summary: John Romero, co-creator of the iconic game Doom, is confirmed as a headline speaker. He will appear at the upcoming Gamescom Asia x Thailand Game Show 2026. This marks a significant event for fans and industry professionals.

headline: 50/50 Director Jonathan Levine in Talks to Direct Tom Cruise Sequel Days of Thunder 2
summary: Jonathan Levine, director of '50/50,' is in talks to direct 'Days of Thunder 2.' The film is set to be another high-speed legacy sequel for Tom Cruise. Paramount is reportedly preparing to produce the follow-up.

headline: LEGO Donkey Kong Arcade Set Officially Announced
summary: LEGO has officially unveiled its new Donkey Kong Arcade Set. The set prominently features characters like Donkey Kong, Lady, and Jumpman. This marks the latest Nintendo-themed collaboration for LEGO.

headline: Save $1,500 Off an Alienware Area-51 Ryzen X3D Gaming PC With RTX 5090 GPU and 64GB of RAM
summary: Gamers can save $1,500 on an Alienware Area-51 Ryzen X3D gaming PC. The powerful system features an RTX 5090 GPU and 64GB of RAM. Despite the discount, it remains a premium purchase but offers competitive value.

headline: Police officer was violent rapist who attacked women over 14 years, BBC reveals
summary: A BBC investigation has revealed a police officer to be a violent rapist. PC Alan Greer attacked women over a 14-year period. Detectives have identified nine victims, with more expected to come forward.

headline: 'What was their crime?': BBC visits Iran school where strike killed 120 children
summary: The BBC visited an Iranian school in Minab where a strike killed 120 children five months ago. The grief remains raw among the community, as recalled by a teacher and a mother. The report questions the motives behind the tragic attack.

headline: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
summary: The US has signed a landmark peaceful nuclear co-operation agreement with Saudi Arabia. The deal aims to give US firms significant access to Saudi's nuclear energy program. This agreement was announced by the US Department of Energy.

headline: Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
summary: The Houthi group claims new attacks on oil tankers in the Red Sea. These alleged attacks are the first since the group announced a maritime embargo against Saudi Arabia. The claims come amidst ongoing US strikes targeting Iran.
